version_restore_confirm_desc: Version v{{version}} and all newer history versions will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
version_delete_confirm_desc: Version v{{version}} will be permanently removed and cannot be restored. If this is the last history version, you will no longer be able to roll back to earlier content.
upload_resume_desc: Select the same file to resume uploading.
upload_concurrency_desc: Number of files uploaded at the same time
upload_auto_clear_completed_desc: Hide uploads from this panel after they finish
drop_files_desc: Files will be uploaded to the current folder.
drop_files_or_folders: Drop files or folders here to upload
drop_files_or_folders_desc: Files and folders will be uploaded to the current folder.
folder_empty_desc: Upload files or create a folder to get started.
batch_delete_confirm_desc: You can still restore them from trash later.
batch_target_folder_desc: Choose the destination folder for the selected items.
batch_target_current_folder_hint: Confirm to place the selected items in this folder.
batch_target_empty_desc: You can use the current folder, or go up to choose another location.
batch_target_empty: There are no subfolders in the current location
batch_move_failed: Could not move the selected items
batch_copy_failed: Could not copy the selected items
batch_delete_failed: Could not move the selected items to trash
batch_restore_failed: Could not restore the selected items
batch_purge_failed: Could not permanently delete the selected items
batch_target_invalid_self: This folder cannot be used as the destination because it is already part of the selected items.
batch_target_invalid_descendant: This destination cannot be used because it is inside the folder being moved or copied.
confirm_delete_desc: You can still restore it from trash later.
trash_page_desc: Deleted items stay until their expiration time; you can restore or permanently delete them before then.
trash_restore_failed: Could not restore the selected items
trash_purge_failed: Could not permanently delete the selected items
trash_purge_confirm_desc: These items cannot be restored afterward.
preview_not_available: Preview is not available for this file type
preview_not_available_desc: Download the file, or try another open mode later.
choose_open_method: Choose how to open this file
preview_coming_soon: This preview mode is not available yet
preview_coming_soon_desc: The required renderer is still under development.
edited_by_others: A newer change to this file was detected. Reload to continue with the latest version.
office_preview_timeout_desc: {{provider}} is responding slowly. Retry, switch providers, or download the file instead.
office_preview_error_desc: The preview link could not be prepared. Retry, switch providers, or download the file instead.
office_preview_public_url_desc: {{provider}} can only load documents from publicly reachable URLs. This preview link looks like localhost, a private network address, or a local-only hostname, so online preview will fail.
office_preview_https_required_desc: {{provider}} can only load documents from HTTPS URLs. This preview link is using HTTP, so online preview will fail.
table_truncated: This file is large. Only the first {{count}} rows are shown.
archive_preview_empty: This archive does not contain visible entries.
archive_preview_no_matches: No archive entries match this search.
archive_preview_disabled: Archive preview is disabled by the administrator.
archive_preview_unsupported_type: Archive preview currently supports ZIP files only.
archive_preview_source_too_large: This archive exceeds the preview size limit set by the administrator.
archive_preview_invalid_zip: This file is not a valid ZIP archive.
archive_preview_rejected: This archive does not meet the server preview limits.
structured_parse_failed: Failed to parse structured content. Try switching back to source view.
unsaved_confirm_desc: There are unsaved edits on this page. Continuing will discard them.
video_browser_unavailable_desc: Check the video browser deployment config and allowed origins.
video_browser_external_desc: This video browser is configured to open outside the preview dialog.
wopi_unavailable_desc: The WOPI session could not be initialized. Check the backend WOPI Host, token issuance, and client configuration.
wopi_external_desc: {{label}} is configured to open outside the preview dialog.
url_template_unavailable_desc: The configured target URL could not be resolved or is not allowed by the preview app settings.
url_template_external_desc: {{label}} is configured to open outside the preview dialog.
upload_resume_mismatch: This file does not match the saved upload session (expected {{name}}, {{size}})
